name: AeroGlide Ergonomic Wireless Mouse
description: High-precision wireless mouse with a contoured design to reduce wrist strain. Features quiet-click buttons, adjustable DPI (800/1200/1600/2400), and a rechargeable battery lasting up to 70 days on a single charge.
return_policy: 30-day standard return window. Must include original packaging.

name: Apex Pro Mechanical Keyboard
description: Tenkeyless (TKL) mechanical gaming keyboard featuring hot-swappable linear red switches, per-key RGB backlighting, and a detachable USB-C braided cable. Built with an aluminum top plate for durability.

name: NovaSound ANC Wireless Headphones
description: Over-ear headphones featuring Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation (ANC), 40mm dynamic drivers, and Ambient Sound mode. Offers up to 45 hours of playback time. Quick charge provides 5 hours of playback from a 10-minute charge.
return_policy: Product specific: Returns accepted within 15 days only if security seal is unbroken.

name: EchoPulse Mini Bluetooth Speaker
description: IPX7 waterproof portable speaker with 360-degree sound projection and a 12-hour battery life. Includes a built-in carabiner clip for outdoor use.

name: VividView 27-inch 4K Monitor
description: IPS panel monitor with 3840x2160 resolution, 99% sRGB color gamut, HDR10 support, and a 60Hz refresh rate. Inputs include 2x HDMI 2.0 and 1x DisplayPort 1.4. Features an adjustable tilt stand.
return_policy: 30-day standard return window. Covered under a 1-year zero-bright-dot warranty.

name: LuminaGlow RGB Desk Mat
description: Extra-large desk pad (800x300mm) with a micro-textured cloth surface for optimal mouse tracking. Features 14 RGB lighting modes along the stitched edges, powered via detachable micro-USB cable.

name: Titanium Edge Multi-Tool
description: 14-in-1 stainless steel multi-tool featuring needle-nose pliers, wire cutters, a serrated knife, can opener, and a set of 5 screwdriver bits. Comes with a nylon belt sheath.
return_policy: Lifetime warranty against manufacturing defects. 30-day returns for unused items.

name: TrailBlazer 30L Hiking Backpack
description: Lightweight, weather-resistant nylon backpack with a 30-liter capacity. Features a breathable mesh back panel, an integrated rain cover hidden in the bottom pocket, and a dedicated compartment for a 2L hydration bladder (bladder not included).

name: ThermoLock 32oz Insulated Flask
description: Double-wall vacuum-insulated stainless steel water bottle. Keeps beverages cold for up to 24 hours or hot for up to 12 hours. Comes with an interchangeable leak-proof straw lid and a wide-mouth chug lid.

name: BaristaPro Conical Burr Coffee Grinder
description: Electric coffee grinder with 40 individual grind settings from ultra-fine espresso to coarse French press. Equipped with a heavy-duty stainless steel conical burr mechanism and a digital countdown timer.

name: AeroPress Clear Coffee Maker
description: Rapid, total-immersion brewing system made from durable, shatterproof Tritan plastic. Makes 1 to 3 cups of smooth, grit-free coffee or espresso-style concentrate in about a minute. Includes 100 paper micro-filters.
compatibility: Uses standard AeroPress paper or metal filters

name: Solis Fleece Throw Blanket
description: Ultra-soft microfiber flannel blanket measuring 50x60 inches. Lightweight yet warm, breathable, and completely machine washable and dryer safe. Resistant to shedding and pilling.
return_policy: 30-day standard return window. Item must be unwashed.

name: Zenith Ergonomic Desk Chair
description: High-back office chair with breathable mesh back, adjustable 3D armrests, dynamic lumbar support, and a pneumatic seat height adjustment from 18 to 22 inches. Supports up to 300 lbs.
return_policy: 30-day return window. Return shipping fees apply due to item weight ($35 fee deducted from refund).

name: Minimalist Walnut Writing Desk
description: Clean, scandinavian-inspired desk featuring a solid walnut veneer top and matte black steel legs. Includes two slim pull-out drawers for laptops or stationery and a discreet cable routing slot at the back.
return_policy: 30-day return window. Item must be unassembled and in original box.

name: Lumix Smart LED Desk Lamp
description: Dimmable LED task lamp with 5 color temperatures (2700K - 6500K) and 6 brightness levels. Features a touch control panel, a built-in 5V/1A USB charging port for smartphones, and an auto-off timer.

name: FitTrack Pro Smart Watch
description: Fitness smartwatch with 24/7 heart rate monitoring, sleep tracking, blood oxygen (SpO2) tracking, and 15 built-in sports modes. Features an AMOLED display and 5 ATM water resistance.
compatibility: Android 7.0 or higher via FitTrack App
return_policy: 30-day standard return window. Electronic components warranty covers 1 year.

name: GripForce Resistance Band Set
description: Set of 5 stackable latex resistance tubes ranging from 10 lbs to 50 lbs (total resistance 150 lbs). Includes 2 cushioned foam handles, 2 ankle straps, 1 door anchor, and a mesh carrying bag.

name: HydroFlow Premium Yoga Mat
description: Eco-friendly, non-slip polyurethane (PU) and natural rubber yoga mat. 6mm thickness offers optimal cushioning for joints. Laser-engraved alignment lines assist with posture precision.
return_policy: 30-day standard return window. Returns rejected if mat shows physical sweat stains or wear.

name: IronCore Adjustable Dumbbell (Single)
description: Single adjustable dial dumbbell that changes weight increments from 5 lbs up to 52.5 lbs with a turn of a dial. Replaces 15 individual dumbbells. Coated in durable thermoplastic rubber to minimize noise.
return_policy: 30-day return window. Note: This item is sold as a single unit, not a pair.

name: PurifyAir H13 HEPA Air Purifier
description: True H13 HEPA air purifier capturing 99.97% of airborne particles down to 0.3 microns, including smoke, pollen, pet dander, and dust. Cleans rooms up to 400 sq ft in 30 minutes. Quiet night mode operates at 22dB.
compatibility: Requires replacement filters every 6 months (Filter SKU: HF-H13-MINI)

name: EmberGlow Portable Camp Stove
description: Ultralight backpacking single-burner stove. Uses isobutane-propane canisters. Features a push-button piezo ignition system and adjustable flame control valve. Folds down to fit inside a pocket-sized hardshell case.
compatibility: Standard screw-on isobutane-propane fuel canisters (EN417 standard)

name: EverDry Waterproof Phone Pouch
description: Pack of 2 clear IPX8 certified universal waterproof cases fitting smartphones up to 7.0 inches. Maintained touch-screen functionality through the pouch walls, allowing underwater photos and videos down to 100 feet.
compatibility: Universal for smartphones up to 7.0 inches (diagonal screen size)

name: Classic Leather Bi-Fold Wallet
description: Genuine top-grain cowhide leather bi-fold wallet. Features 6 card slots, a clear mesh ID window, two bill compartments, and embedded RFID-blocking insulation to protect credit cards from unauthorized scanning.

name: Urbanite Waterproof Canvas Backpack
description: Vintage-style commuter backpack made from heavy waxed water-resistant canvas and real leather straps. Features a padded laptop sleeve for devices up to 15.6 inches, magnetic snap closures, and side bottle pockets.

name: ChronoClassic Men's Quartz Watch
description: Analogue watch with a Japanese quartz movement, stainless steel silver case, and a genuine dark brown leather strap. Features 3 functional chronograph sub-dials (seconds, minutes, 24-hour clock) and date display window. Water resistant up to 30 meters.
return_policy: 30-day standard return window. 2-year internal movement warranty.

name: BreatheSoft Bamboo Bed Sheets
description: 4-piece bed sheet set derived from 100% organic bamboo viscose. Includes 1 flat sheet, 1 fitted sheet with deep 16-inch pockets, and 2 pillowcases. Hypoallergenic, temperature-regulating, and silken texture.
compatibility: Fits Queen-sized mattresses up to 16 inches deep

name: HydroGlow Hyaluronic Acid Serum
description: Intense hydrating face serum containing 2% pure hyaluronic acid complexes paired with Vitamin B5. Plumps skin fine lines, locks in moisture, and restores elasticity. Fragrance-free, paraben-free, cruelty-free.
compatibility: Safe for all skin types (dry, oily, sensitive)
return_policy: Product specific: Can be returned even if opened within 30 days if it causes an allergic reaction.

name: GlowRadiance Vitamin C Face Cream
description: Brightening daily moisturizer enriched with stabilized Vitamin C, Vitamin E, and Ferulic acid. Targets dark spots, hyperpigmentation, and dull skin tone while providing daytime hydration protection.
compatibility: Best suited for normal, combination, and dull skin. Use SPF after applying.

name: SonicPulse Electric Toothbrush
description: Rechargeable sonic toothbrush pulsing 40,000 vibrations per minute. Features 5 cleaning modes (Clean, White, Polish, Gum Care, Sensitive), a smart 2-minute interval timer, and up to 30 days of battery life per charge. Includes 4 replacement heads.
return_policy: 30-day standard return window. 1-year manufacturing defect replacement guarantee.

name: NutriBlend 1200W Personal Blender
description: High-speed personal blender with a 1200-watt motor base capable of crushing ice and frozen fruits instantly. Includes 1x 32oz cup, 1x 24oz cup, two flip-top travel lids, and a stainless steel extractor blade.

name: SwiftCharge 20W Power Bank
description: Ultra-slim 10,000mAh external battery pack supporting Power Delivery (PD 3.0) and Quick Charge (QC 3.0). Dual output ports (1x USB-A, 1x USB-C) allow simultaneous charging of two devices.
compatibility: Universal smartphone and tablet compatibility via USB cables

name: ProFocus 4K Dash Cam
description: Front-facing car dashboard camera recording ultra HD 4K video. Equipped with a Sony Starvis image sensor for night vision, a 170-degree wide-angle lens, built-in GPS tracking for speed data, and G-sensor loop recording.
compatibility: Requires a Class 10 MicroSD card up to 256GB (not included)

name: ChefCut 8-inch Damascus Chef Knife
description: Professional 8-inch chef's kitchen knife forged from 67 layers of Japanese high-carbon Damascus VG-10 steel steel core. Features an ergonomic military-grade G10 handle, mirror-polished edge, and excellent edge retention.
compatibility: Hand wash only. Do not use in dishwasher.
return_policy: 30-day standard return window. Covered by limited lifetime warranty.

name: PetFluff Orthopedic Dog Bed
description: Orthopedic solid egg-crate memory foam dog bed supporting joint health for aging pets. Features a bolster rim on three sides, an ultra-soft plush top layer, and a removable, machine-washable zippered water-resistant cover.
compatibility: Recommended for dogs up to 75 lbs
return_policy: 30-day return window. Vacuum compressed upon delivery; must be allowed 48 hours to fully expand.

name: PurrfectPlay 4-Tier Cat Tree
description: Multi-level modern cat tree condo standing 54 inches tall. Covered in soft faux-fur fabric and features natural sisal-wrapped scratching posts, an elevated top perch, a private condo cubby hole, and two hanging toy mice.

name: AquaClean Automatic Pet Fountain
description: Ultra-quiet automatic water fountain with a 2.5-liter capacity. Features a triple-action purification filter containing carbon, ion-exchange resin, and cotton layers to filter hair and heavy metals. Offers two flow modes: flower waterfall and gentle fountain.
compatibility: Requires replacement carbon filters every 3-4 weeks (Filter SKU: AC-PET-FLTR)

name: TerraGreen Organic Plant Fertilizer
description: All-purpose liquid organic indoor and outdoor plant food. NPK ratio 3-1-2. Concentrated formula made from seaweed extract and fish hydrolysate promotes lush leaf growth and deep root architecture.
compatibility: Dilute 1 tablespoon per gallon of water. Safe for houseplants, vegetables, flowers.

name: HydroPulse Smart Watering Timer
description: Programmable digital water timer attaching to standard outdoor faucets. Features rain-delay settings up to 7 days, manual override watering, a clear LCD display screen, and brass-reinforced leak-proof threads.
compatibility: Fits standard 3/4 inch outdoor garden hose taps. Requires 2x AA batteries (not included).

name: GlowLuxe Outdoor Solar String Lights
description: Weatherproof (IP65) 50-foot long outdoor heavy duty solar-powered fairy string lights. Contains 25 shatterproof retro LED Edison bulbs. Auto on at dusk and turns off at sunrise. High-efficiency monocrystalline solar panel.
compatibility: Solar panel must face direct sunlight. Bulbs are replaceable (S14 base).

name: Starlight HD Mini Projector
description: Portable video projector supporting native 1080P resolution and projection up to 150 inches wide. Emits 6500 lumens of brightness. Integrated stereo speaker system. Ports: HDMI, USB, AV, Audio Out.
compatibility: Laptops, gaming consoles, TV sticks, Roku, iOS/Android phones via adapters
return_policy: Product specific: 30-day return window. Subject to a 15% restocking fee if the item box has been opened.
